## Source: ghsa-malware (d80c25957aa63db0c52ef5b19c2b6ab4ee2d28533352736d23ce0623938dabc6)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (24ecd94ab40a4a1b574b48137b92d60ad65d610301ee07661c928706bd54c81b)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-codingagentintegrations-codingagentintegrations' @ 1.0.2 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
